name: spark-html-dev-tls
description: Local HTTPS for spark-html dev servers. One command fronts your spark-ssr or spark-html-bun dev/preview server with a self-signed TLS reverse proxy, so secure-context browser APIs (camera, mic, geolocation, service workers) work when you open the app on a phone over your LAN. Auto-detects the mode, proxies HTTP + SSE + WebSocket HMR, and generates a SAN cert covering localhost + your LAN IPs. Zero dependencies (uses system openssl).
